full_prompt: Design the primary tubular space-frame chassis for a single-seat electric capstone vehicle intended for campus-ground testing in Dhahran / Thuwal (Saudi Arabia) during the shoulder season when ambient temperatures still reach 45 C. The chassis houses a 60 V LiFePO4 battery pack (20 kg, 300 x 200 x 120 mm) that must remain below 50 C surface temperature during operation. Total dry curb mass below 150 kg (before driver). The space-frame uses AISI 4130 chromoly seamless tubing, main-hoop OD 25.4 mm x 2.4 mm wall, side bracing 22.2 mm x 1.65 mm wall (Young's modulus 205 GPa, yield 460 MPa, ultimate 560 MPa, density 7850 kg/m^3). The battery compartment is shielded by an aluminum 6061-T6 bulkhead (3 mm thickness) on the sun-exposed side. Chassis envelope: 2.4 m length x 1.2 m width x 1.0 m height. Load cases: (LC1) front impact 7 g on 150 kg mass reacting at front bulkhead; (LC2) side impact 15 kN at side-impact bar; (LC3) rollover 1.5 x 150 kg x 9.81 = 2207 N downward at main-hoop apex; (LC4) static gravity with 20 kg battery pack at its mount bolts and 75 kg driver at seat base; (LC5) thermal steady-state: ambient air 45 C, solar flux 950 W/m^2 on the sun-exposed aluminum bulkhead, battery internal heat dissipation 150 W distributed in pack volume, chassis tubes convecting naturally (h = 8 W/m^2/K). Target: keep battery pack surface temperature below 50 C with no active cooling; (LC6) coupled thermal-mechanical: thermal field from LC5 superimposed on LC4 gravity to check residual stress from thermal expansion of dissimilar materials at the Al bulkhead to 4130 tube joint. Pass/fail criteria: (R1) under LC1-LC3 mechanical load cases, max von Mises stress must remain below 306 MPa (460 / 1.5 yield FoS); (R2) chassis dry mass must not exceed 40 kg; (R3) battery pack surface temperature under LC5 must remain below 50 C (primary thermal pass/fail); (R4) under LC6 coupled case, aluminum bulkhead - steel tube joint stress must not exceed 184 MPa (276 / 1.5 yield FoS on the aluminum side, binding); (R5) first torsional natural frequency must exceed 25 Hz. Fluid, radiation, and buckling analyses not primary. Deliverables: STEP AP242 assembly, weld and fastener schedule, mechanical FEA report, steady thermal report with temperature field, coupled thermal-mechanical LC6 report, modal and mass budget.
short_prompt:
Design the primary tubular space-frame chassis for a single-seat electric capstone vehicle for campus testing in Dhahran / Thuwal (Saudi Arabia), shoulder-season ambient to 45 C. Houses a 60 V LiFePO4 battery pack (20 kg, 300 x 200 x 120 mm) that must remain <= 50 C surface without active cooling. Dry curb < 150 kg (before 75 kg driver).

Envelope: AISI 4130 tubing (main-hoop 25.4 x 2.4, side 22.2 x 1.65); 6061-T6 3 mm aluminum bulkhead on the sun-exposed side; chassis envelope 2.4 x 1.2 x 1.0 m.

Factor regime: yield FoS 1.5 on mechanical cases (306 MPa); dry mass <= 40 kg; battery surface < 50 C under thermal; dissimilar-material joint yield FoS 1.5 on 6061-T6 side (184 MPa); first torsional mode > 25 Hz.

Load cases.
- Front impact: 7 g on 150 kg at the front bulkhead.
- Side impact: 15 kN at the side-impact bar.
- Rollover: 1.5 x 150 kg x 9.81 = 2207 N down at the hoop apex.
- Static gravity: 20 kg battery on its mount bolts + 75 kg driver at the seat base.
- Steady thermal: 45 C ambient + 950 W/m^2 solar on the Al bulkhead + 150 W battery dissipation, natural convection on tubes (h = 8 W/m^2/K).
- Coupled thermal-mechanical: LC5 thermal field on top of LC4 gravity at the Al-to-4130 joint.

prompt.title: research university / KFUPM Capstone EV Small Chassis — Hot-Desert Thermal + Structural
prompt.brief: 4130 + 6061 hybrid chassis for 150 kg EV, 45 C ambient, 950 W/m^2 solar, passive battery cooling gate 50 C.

load_cases.name: static_gravity_driver_battery
load_cases.application: 20 kg at battery mount + 75 kg at seat

recommended_fea_setup.element_type: beam for tubes; shell for bulkhead; TET10 at joints

notes.needs_rulebook_fetch_reason: research university/KFUPM EV capstone is not documented in public PDFs (per catalog Tier C drops, Saudi tree). Values align with collegiate formula-class racecar benchmark-style gates + a hot-desert thermal gate. Confirm actual rulebook on acquisition.

exclusions_explained.fluid_analysis: Convective cooling modeled via h coefficient.
exclusions_explained.radiation_analysis: Solar radiation as surface heat flux BC.
exclusions_explained.buckling_analysis: Stress gate bounds tubes at this slenderness.

eval_coverage: collegiate formula-class racecar benchmark-style impact cases
